channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Common Walking Mistakes and How to Correct Them
item.description: Walking is an excellent low-impact exercise, but improper footwear, pace, or routine can hinder progress and cause injury.

item.title: Can Yogurt Help Prevent Colon Cancer?

2MM: AI Roundup: FDA Reviews Liver Injury Prediction Tool, Joint Commission Launches Healthcare AI Certification, Governance Playbooks Aim to Standardize Adoption, and Pediatric Hospitals Bring Generative Tools to the Frontline
item.description: The FDA is reviewing an AI tool for liver injury prediction, while the Joint Commission launches healthcare AI certification and governance playbooks aim to standardize adoption.

item.title: 11 Natural Ways to Lower Your Cortisol Levels
